nasb.text: But the thing was displeasing in the sight of Samuel when they said, “Give us a king to judge us.” And Samuel prayed to the Lord.

esv.text: But the thing displeased Samuel when they said, “Give us a king to judge us.” And Samuel prayed to the Lord.

cnv.text: 他們說“求你為我們立一個王治理我們”這件事，使撒母耳很不高興，他就禱告耶和華。

ccb.text: 撒母耳听到他们要求立一个王治理他们，心中不悦，就向耶和华祷告。
